samples.text: A broken light bulb cannot produce light. This bulb is broken. Will this bulb light up?
When a light bulb is damaged, it is unable to illuminate. The bulb in question is damaged. Can this bulb illuminate?
A damaged lamp cannot emit illumination. This lamp is damaged. Will this lamp emit illumination?
This bulb is broken. A broken bulb has a severed filament and cannot complete the electrical circuit needed for light. Will it light up?
A broken light bulb cannot produce light. This bulb is broken. The lamp socket is functioning normally. Will this bulb light up?
